record.source_version: Studio inspiration-block catalog retrieved via MCP
modifications: Replaced the source's Avatar/AvatarFallback icon chip with a plain styled span carrying the same token classes; the platform does not own an Avatar primitive and one icon chip does not justify importing a new primitive system

Separated the source's single trend prop into trend (arrow direction, a fact) and tone (positive/negative/neutral interpretation) so a falling defect count can trend down with a positive tone; tone maps to the governed status-role tokens (text-status-success/critical), never raw palette

Added the canonical states the source lacks: loading (owned Skeleton with sr-only announcement and aria-busy), errorText (explicit unavailable language, role=status), and stale (visible 'Stale' text annotation per the compact-KPI grammar's explicit-language rule)
Added sr-only trend direction text ('increase'/'decrease'/'no change') so delta direction is stated in words, not color or icon alone, per DASHBOARD_AND_DATA_VISUALIZATION.md's compact-KPI anatomy
Renamed badgeContent to periodText (the governed time window/comparison basis) and added optional freshnessText, both required by the compact-KPI anatomy
Changed Card/Badge/Skeleton imports from generic shadcn '@/components/ui/*' aliases to the platform's owned '@meridian/ui-web/components/*'
Extracted the value/loading/error branch into a MetricCardValue helper to satisfy the platform's noNestedTernary lint rule
Dropped the source's page.tsx route wrapper and hardcoded demo data; this is a reusable primitive, not a standalone route
